text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: Happy Valentine's Day, Trainer! ♪

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: Well then, shall we go?

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: Hehe! You'll find out once we get there. ♪

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's Valentine's Day, and for some reason, Satono
Diamond has suddenly decided to take me
somewhere. The place we arrive is...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Nowhere special. We're just standing outside
Ritto Dorm. However, an unfamiliar device sits in
front of the entrance.
choice_data_list:
What's with the claw machine and that mountain
of boxes?!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: Hehe! This is your Valentine's surprise!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: I've prepared an extra, extra large claw machine for you!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
The rules are the same as a regular claw machine
except a person is suspended from the crane and
has to grab the prizes themselves.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
In other words, someone will have to act as the
claw.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
I thought it'd be fun to surprise you for
Valentine's Day, so I did quite a bit of research
looking for ideas.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
That's when I came across an article about a
company affiliated with the Satono Group that
used a giant claw machine during an event!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
It looked like so much fun, I went and borrowed
the machine along with some staff to help
operate it. ♪

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
The prizes are Valentine's chocolates! I've
prepared many different varieties, so go ahead
and take the ones you like!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
I've included everything from inexpensive
chocolates to limited edition chocolates made by
famous chocolatiers.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
The staff will operate the crane for you. Just tell
them in which direction you want to move! ♪

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
Yes, that's right! You get to be the claw! I hope
you enjoy my special Valentine's Day gift!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I shouldn't have expected anything less from
Satono Diamond, with her curiosity and rich
imagination. As her trainer, I have no choice but
to participate!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
Traaainer! Please shout out the direction you
want to go!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
Okaaay!
Lower it down carefully, please!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The claw operator is so skilled at handling the
machine, I don't feel scared at all as I'm lowered
toward the mountain of chocolate.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
In fact, I'm starting to have a lot of fun! I reach
out for the chocolate surrounding me and fill my
arms to maximum capacity.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
Wow! You're quite good at this! Your sense of
balance is fantastic!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
Would you like to go for one more round? Be
careful not to drop any!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
Hehe! You're completely absorbed in the game!
I'm so glad you're enjoying yourself! ♪

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
Brilliant performance, Trainer! I couldn't stop
watching you!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
But more importantly, it looked like you had a lot
of fun.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: Hehe. Great! ♪

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
I'd love to share even more fun experiences with
you. Both on and off the track.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
Oh right, the chocolates! You won them fair and
square, so feel free to tuck in!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
I plan to eat some chocolate and reminisce about
the day after I get back too.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
No doubt I'll remember her smile every day as I
slowly work through the massive amount of
chocolates I won from the claw machine.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
In fact, I'm starting to have a lot of fun! I scoop
up an armful of the chocolates surrounding me.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: Oh! That one is, um...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The wrapping on one of the boxes is a little messy
and looks hand-wrapped. I reach for it, losing my
balance in the process.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: T-Trainer! Please don't push yourself too hard!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: Oh no, you dropped your other chocolates...

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: Could it be that... you noticed?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
My haul from the claw machine is impressive.
Above all else, I manage to snag the box with the
slightly misshapen wrapping!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
That one, um... It contains chocolates I made
myself.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
So you went out of your way to get it because
you realized I made it?

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: Geez...

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: Please, go ahead.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I unwrap the box, pluck out one of the beautifully
placed chocolates, and take a bite.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I'm puzzled by the curious taste that fills my
senses. It's not that it's bad—I would even say
that it's tasty—but I can't place the flavor.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: Does it taste strange?
choice_data_list:
It's good, but I can't figure out what it is I'm
tasting...

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
I had a feeling that might be the case... I wanted
to try giving the chocolate a unique flavor, but
they turned out a bit funny...

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
I didn't think they were terrible when I sampled
them, but I honestly wasn't sure if they were good
enough to give to you...

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
Thank you so much for trying them! You don't
need to eat them all!
choice_data_list:
Want to try finding something that pairs well
with this chocolate?

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: Huh?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I feel that pairing the chocolates with another
flavor will make them taste better, so I suggest
eating them with other food.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
I see. So you think we should search for
something that will complement it, like another
snack or some fruit?

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: That sounds fun! Let's do it!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
We try eating the chocolates with all kinds of
different things in an attempt to come up with a
tasty combination.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
In the end, we find that Satono Diamond's
homemade chocolates go best with dragonfruit.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
Hehe. We've created a one-of-a-kind chocolate
experience, haven't we?

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
Even though it tastes fantastic, I won't tell a soul
about this combination. It'll be our little secret. ♪
